api_key.description: Calendly personal access token or OAuth token. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>); never logged.

organization_uri.description: The authenticated user's Calendly organization URI (e.g. https://api.calendly.com/organizations/AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA), used to scope every organization-level list request (organization=<organization_uri>). Legacy discovers this dynamically on every read via GET /users/me (current_organization); the engine dialect has no mechanism to chain a prior request's response into a later request's query params, so this bundle asks the operator to configure the (per-account invariant) URI once instead — resolvable by calling GET https://api.calendly.com/users/me and reading resource.current_organization. See docs.md's Known limits.

base_url.description: Calendly API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only scheduled_events starting at or after this time are read (Calendly's min_start_time filter). Other streams have no server-side lower-bound filter, matching legacy.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-100), sent as the count query param.
